message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

package "app" {
    package "controllers" {
        class ClassController {
            - obList : ObservableList<Class>
            - col_defBus : TableColumn<Class, Button>
            - col_att1 : TableColumn<Class, String>
            - col_att2 : TableColumn<Class, Integer>
            - col_att3 : TableColumn<Class, String>
            - col_att4 : TableColumn<Class, String>
            - col_updateBtn : TableColumn<Class, Button>
            - tableview : TableView<Class>
            + initialize()
            + updateClass()
            + home()
        }

        class DashboardController {
            - obList : ObservableList<Attendance>
            - stList : ObservableList<StudentList>
            - lblAtt : Label
            - btn_addBus : TableColumn<Attendance, Button>
            - col_bus : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
            - col_att1 : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
            - col_att2 : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
            - col_indivnum : TableColumn<StudentList, String>
            - col_surname : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
            - col_givenname : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
            - col_gender : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
            - hourCount : Label
            - tblAbs : TableView<StudentList>
            - tblAtt : TableView<Attendance>
            + refresh()
            + home()
            + listStudents()
        }

        class HomeController {
            + dashboard()
            + classed()
            + login()
            + update()
        }

        class LogicController {
            - pf_pass : PasswordField
            - tf_email : TextField
            + initLogin()
            + login()
        }

        class OptionController {
            - obList : ObservableList<User>
            - col_defBus : TableColumn<User, Button>
            - col_email : TableColumn<User, String>
            - col_password : TableColumn<User, String>
            - col_id : TableColumn<User, Integer>
            - col_updateBtn : TableColumn<User, Button>
            - tableview : TableView<User>
            + initialize()
            + addNewTeacher()
            + home()
        }

        class RegisterController {
            - pf_confirm : PasswordField
            - pf_password : PasswordField
            - tf_email : TextField
            - tf_fname : TextField
            - tf_surname : TextField
            + login()
            + register()
        }

        class StudentController {
            - obList : ObservableList<User>
            - col_birthday : TableColumn<User, String>
            - col_class : TableColumn<User, Button>
            - col_email : TableColumn<User, String>
            - col_firstname : TableColumn<User, String>
            - col_gender : TableColumn<User, String>
            - col_surname : TableColumn<User, String>
            - col_updateBtn : TableColumn<User, Button>
            - tableview : TableView<User>
            + initialize()
            + addNewStudent()
            + home()
        }

        class TimetableController {
            - tList : ObservableList<Timetable>
            - col_day : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            - col_hour : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            - col_subject : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            - col_week : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            - table : TableView<Timetable>
            - week_drop : ChoiceBox<String>
            + initialize()
            + setTable()
            + home()
            + updateTimetable()
        }

        class UpdateController {
            - btn_delete : Button
            - btn_update : Button
            - btn_update1 : Button
            - drop_class : ChoiceBox<String>
            - drop_indv : ChoiceBox<String>
            - drop_day : ChoiceBox<String>
            - drop_hour : ChoiceBox<String>
            - drop_subj : ChoiceBox<String>
            - drop_week : ChoiceBox<String>
            - drop_start : ChoiceBox<String>
            - drop_end : ChoiceBox<String>
            - drop_year : ChoiceBox<String>
            - drop_month : ChoiceBox<String>
            - day_start : ChoiceBox<Integer>
            - day_end : ChoiceBox<Integer>
            + initialize()
            + delete()
            + DayStart()
            + DayEnd()
            + WeekStart()
            + WeekEnd()
            + enable()
            + disable()
            + showTTime()
            + createTimetable()
            + home()
            + hourFinded()
            + hourFinded1()
            + hourStart()
            + hourStart1()
            + updateTimetable()
        }

        class newClassController {
            - drop_grach : ChoiceBox<Integer>
            - lbl_number : Label
            - tf_cts : TextField
            - tf_class : TextField
            - tf_semester : TextField
            + initialize()
            + setTable()
        }

        class newStudentController {
            - tf_email : TextField
            - tf_firstname : TextField
            - tf_gender : TextField
            - tf_surname : TextField
            + initialize()
            + addStudent()
        }

        class updateClassController {
            - drop_grach : ChoiceBox<Integer>
            - lbl_number : Label
            - tf_cts : TextField
            - tf_class : TextField
            - tf_semester : TextField
            + initialize()
            + setTable()
            + updateClass()
        }

        class updateStudentController {
            - popFill : AnchorPane
            - tf_email : TextField
            - tf_firstname : TextField
            - tf_gender : TextField
            - tf_surname : TextField
            + initialize()
            + updateStudent()
        }

        class updateTeacherController {
            - pf_confirm : PasswordField
            - pf_password : PasswordField
            - popFill : AnchorPane
            - tf_email : TextField
            - tf_fname : TextField
            - tf_surname : TextField
            + initialize()
            + setValues()
            + updateTeacher()
        }
    }
}

package "java" {
    interface fxinit {
        {static}
        + initialize()
    }
}

fxinit ..|> ClassController
fxinit ..|> DashboardController
fxinit ..|> HomeController
fxinit ..|> LogicController
fxinit ..|> OptionController
fxinit ..|> RegisterController
fxinit ..|> StudentController
fxinit ..|> TimetableController
fxinit ..|> UpdateController
fxinit ..|> newClassController
fxinit ..|> newStudentController
fxinit ..|> updateClassController
fxinit ..|> updateStudentController
fxinit ..|> updateTeacherController

@enduml
```
